title: astragalus koulehensis
intro: Astragalus koulehensis, also known as Kouleh milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Iranian traditional medicine, for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The medicinal properties of Astragalus koulehensis are attributed to its high content of polysaccharides, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Astragalus koulehensis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is valued for its potential health benefits, including enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health.
